hero.subtitle: Manage clients, build diet plans, track body composition, and communicate with clients — so you can focus on what matters.

socialProof.title: Built for nutritionists who refuse to settle for spreadsheets

problem.title: Too many tools. Too much admin.
problem.subtitle: Most nutritionists waste 10+ hours a week on admin work that could be automated. Sound familiar?

manualDataEntry.title: Manual PDF data entry
manualDataEntry.description: You're typing numbers from InBody or SECA reports into spreadsheets. Every. Single. Time.

scatteredCommunication.title: Scattered communication
scatteredCommunication.description: Client messages across WhatsApp, email, and SMS. Nothing is centralized, nothing is tracked.

hoursOnDietPlanning.title: Hours on diet planning
hoursOnDietPlanning.description: Building meal plans from scratch in Word or Excel. Copy-pasting macros. Reformatting PDFs.

noSingleSource.title: No single source of truth
noSingleSource.description: Client data lives in 5 different apps. Progress is impossible to track at a glance.

recipeChaos.title: Recipe chaos
recipeChaos.description: Recipes scattered across bookmarks, PDFs, and notes. No nutritional data, no easy reuse.

missedFollowUps.title: Missed follow-ups
missedFollowUps.description: Clients slip through the cracks when there's no system for reminders, check-ins, or progress alerts.

solution.subtitle: GetNutria replaces your spreadsheets, WhatsApp groups, and manual workflows with a single, intelligent platform designed for nutrition professionals.

features.title: Everything your nutrition practice needs
features.subtitle: From first consultation to long-term progress tracking — GetNutria covers every step.

crm.title: Client CRM
crm.description: Every client in one place. Goals, history, notes, measurements — all searchable, all organized.

appointments.title: Appointments & Reminders
appointments.description: Book appointments, send reminders, and track attendance — integrated with client profiles.

onboarding.title: Client Onboarding
onboarding.description: Invite clients via email. They get a guided onboarding to set up their profile and preferences.

roleBasedAccess.title: Role-Based Access
roleBasedAccess.description: Admin and nutritionist roles with proper permissions. Manage your team and client assignments.

dietTemplates.title: Diet Templates
dietTemplates.description: Build reusable diet plan templates. Apply and customize per client in minutes, not hours.

personalizedDietPlans.title: Personalized Diet Plans
personalizedDietPlans.description: Create client-specific meal plans with macros, portions, and automatic calculations.

foodLibrary.title: Food Library & Recipes
foodLibrary.description: Access a comprehensive food database. Create and manage recipes with nutritional breakdowns.

builtInMessaging.title: Built-in Messaging
builtInMessaging.description: Chat with clients directly inside the platform. No more scattered WhatsApp threads.

bodyComposition.title: Body Composition Tracking
bodyComposition.description: Track weight, body fat, muscle mass, and water balance over time with clear analytics.

analyticsInsights.title: Analytics & Insights
analyticsInsights.description: See trends, progress, and data at a glance. Make evidence-based decisions for each client.

clientPortal.title: Client Portal
clientPortal.description: Clients view their plans, track meals, and check progress from any device. You stay in control.

progressReports.title: Progress Reports
progressReports.description: Generate visual progress reports to share with clients. Keep them motivated and informed.

aiPdfImport.title: AI PDF Import
aiPdfImport.description: Upload InBody, SECA, or any measurement PDF. AI extracts and maps metrics automatically.

aiDietGenerator.title: AI Diet Generator
aiDietGenerator.description: Generate personalized diet plans from client goals and preferences. Review, adjust, and assign.

aiRecipeImport.title: AI Recipe Import & Generator
aiRecipeImport.description: Import recipes from any source or generate new ones. Nutritional data calculated automatically.

aiClientInsights.title: AI Client Insights
aiClientInsights.description: Surface patterns in client progress, flag missed targets, and suggest adjustments — AI-assisted.

howItWorks.title: Simple setup. Real workflows.
howItWorks.subtitle: Book a demo, get set up with our team, and start managing your practice right away.

step1.title: Add your clients
step1.description: Import existing client data or add new ones. Goals, preferences, and notes — all in one profile.

step2.title: Import or track data
step2.description: Upload InBody/SECA PDFs or enter measurements manually. AI-assisted import handles the extraction.

step3.title: Create diet plans
step3.description: Use templates or build from scratch. Customize meals, portions, and macro targets per client.

step4.title: Monitor progress
step4.description: Track body composition trends, schedule follow-ups, and adjust plans based on real data.

cta.title: Product walkthrough coming soon
cta.description: We're preparing a quick video walkthrough of the platform. In the meantime, book a live demo to see GetNutria in action.

productPreview.title: Designed for how you actually work
productPreview.subtitle: A dashboard you'll want to open every morning. A client portal your clients will actually use.

benefits.title: Less busywork. Better outcomes.
benefits.subtitle: GetNutria isn't just another tool — it's the operational backbone your practice needs.

hoursSaved.description: Automate diet plans, PDF imports, and client follow-ups. Spend your time on consultations, not admin.

clientExperience.description: Clients who can track their progress and message you directly stay engaged and see better results.

professional.description: Clean dashboards, structured plans, and a polished client portal. Look like the expert you are.

insights.description: Spot trends, track compliance, and make evidence-based decisions instead of guessing.

demoForm.title: See GetNutria in action
demoForm.subtitle: Tell us about your practice and we'll schedule a personalized walkthrough of the platform.

success.title: Thank you!
success.message: We've received your demo request. Our team will reach out within 1 business day to schedule your personalized walkthrough.

placeholders.name: Your full name
placeholders.message: Tell us about your practice or any specific needs...

footerText.line1: We'll respond within 1 business day. No spam, no pressure.

finalCta.subtitle: Book a personalized demo and we'll walk you through how GetNutria can work for your specific workflow.

footer.description: The all-in-one platform for nutritionists and dietitians. Manage clients, create diet plans, track progress, and communicate — all in one place.

metadata.title: GetNutria — Nutrition Practice Management Platform
metadata.description: Manage clients, diet plans, measurements, appointments, and communication in one platform for nutritionists and dietitians.
